title: SLSim: a strong lensing population simulation package
summary: Gravitational lensing offers unique insights into cosmology by bending light around massive objects. Strong gravitational lensing, in particular, produces magnified and often multiple images of distant sources, crucial for precise cosmological measurements and understanding the distribution of dark matter in the universe. Current studies are limited by the number of strong gravitational lenses. From upcoming cosmological surveys, we anticipate observing a several orders of magnitude increase in the number of lenses, for both static and transient phenomena. However, detecting and analyzing these events from vast surveys like Vera C. Rubin Observatory Legacy Survey of Space and Time (LSST) presents significant challenges. To prepare for these challenges, we introduce SLSim, a versatile simulation tool tailored for the Vera C. Rubin Observatory. SLSim integrates advanced astrophysical models with computational efficiency to generate synthetic strong lens populations under realistic observational conditions. SLSim simulates static and variable lensing scenarios, essential for cosmological studies, training and testing lens search and data analysis pipelines. This paper details SLSim,'s design and implementation, emphasizing its modularity and capabilities across various astrophysical regimes. Validation against observational data and existing simulations confirms SLSim's accuracy in reproducing observed lensing phenomena. SLSim is publicly available at https://github.com/LSST-strong-lensing/slsim, and we anticipate continued development and expansion of its capabilities. Users are encouraged to check the repository for updates and to contribute to ongoing community efforts in strong lensing simulations.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 引力透镜通过使光线在大质量物体周围弯曲，为宇宙学提供了独特的见解。特别是强引力透镜，会产生放大且通常多重的遥远源图像，这对于精确的宇宙学测量和理解宇宙中暗物质的分布至关重要。当前的研究受到强引力透镜数量的限制。从即将开展的宇宙学巡天中，我们预计观测到的透镜数量将增加几个数量级，无论是对于静态现象还是瞬变现象。然而，从诸如维拉·C·鲁宾天文台时空遗产巡天（LSST）等大规模巡天中探测和分析这些事件面临着重大挑战。为应对这些挑战，我们推出了SLSim，这是一个专为维拉·C·鲁宾天文台量身定制的多功能模拟工具。SLSim将先进的天体物理模型与计算效率相结合，能够在逼真的观测条件下生成合成的强透镜星族。SLSim模拟静态和可变透镜场景，这对于宇宙学研究、训练和测试透镜搜索及数据分析流程至关重要。本文详细介绍了SLSim的设计与实现，强调了其模块化特性以及在不同天体物理领域的能力。通过与观测数据和现有模拟的验证，确认了SLSim在再现观测到的透镜现象方面的准确性。SLSim可在https://github.com/LSST-strong-lensing/slsim公开获取，我们预计其功能将持续开发和扩展。鼓励用户查看代码库以获取更新，并为强透镜模拟领域的持续社区工作做出贡献。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，SLSim为应对未来大规模强引力透镜观测挑战提供了关键工具，其模块化设计和公开可用性将促进宇宙学研究和透镜分析流程的发展。

title: The birth of the intracluster medium: the evolution of multiphase gas and Lyman-$α$ haloes in a simulated $z\sim3$ protocluster
comment: 17 pages, 13 figures, to be submitted to The Open Journal of Astrophysics
summary: Galactic haloes host a complex, multiphase circumgalactic medium (CGM), and at high redshift are fed by cold, filamentary inflows. In contrast, mature galaxy clusters are dominated by a hot, enriched, X-ray emitting intracluster medium (ICM), with cold gas largely confined to member galaxies. However, the transition between these regimes remains poorly constrained. We present a cosmological zoom-in simulation of a massive cluster progenitor evolved to $z=2.7$, with enhanced CGM resolution to better trace the accretion, mergers and feedback events that precede the birth of the ICM. We connect this evolution to mock MgII and OVII absorption, tracing low and high ionisation gas phases. We also study Lyman-$α$ (Ly$α$) and Balmer-$α$ (H$α$) haloes in emission, using radiative transfer in post-processing. Between $z\sim4.4$ and $2.7$, a major merger and AGN feedback drive an inside-out transformation, redistributing gas to larger radii and flattening density, temperature and metallicity profiles. Intermediate column MgII absorbers are rapidly destroyed, leaving a clumpier cold gas distribution associated with satellites, while gas is ionised beyond OVII as the inner halo enters the X-ray regime. An extended Ly$α$ halo remains detectable even without AGN photoionisation, and evolves from filamentary to more spherical as inflowing gas is disrupted. Our fiducial model underpredicts observed central Ly$α$ emission - we likely require more efficient Ly$α$ production in the nuclear region, either through more effective escape of stellar Ly$α$ photons or through enhanced conversion of AGN-powered ionisation into Ly$α$ emission. H$α$ haloes are dimmer and smaller than Ly$α$, but with JWST may provide a complementary probe of the evolving CGM at this critical epoch.

AI.tldr: 该研究通过高分辨率宇宙学模拟追踪了星系团前身从z=4.4到2.7的演化过程，揭示了冷气体流入、星系合并和AGN反馈如何驱动星系晕从冷气体主导向热X射线发射介质的转变。
AI.motivation: 星系晕中的多相环星系介质与成熟星系团的热富集X射线发射介质之间的过渡机制尚不明确，需要高分辨率模拟来追踪星系团形成早期的吸积、合并和反馈过程。
AI.method: 使用增强环星系介质分辨率的宇宙学放大模拟，追踪星系团前身从z=4.4到2.7的演化；通过后处理辐射传输分析MgII、OVII吸收线以及Lyα和Hα发射晕。
AI.result: 主要星系合并和AGN反馈驱动了由内而外的转变：气体重新分布到更大半径，密度、温度和金属丰度剖面变平；中等柱密度MgII吸收体被迅速破坏，气体被电离到OVII以上，内晕进入X射线状态；Lyα晕保持可探测但模型低估了中心Lyα发射。
AI.conclusion: 星系团形成早期经历了从冷气体主导到热介质主导的快速转变，Lyα和Hα发射晕可作为追踪这一关键时期环星系介质演化的互补探针，但需要改进模型以更好地解释中心Lyα发射。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 星系晕包含复杂的多相环星系介质（CGM），在高红移时由冷丝状流入物质供能。相比之下，成熟的星系团以炽热、富含金属、发射X射线的星系团内介质（ICM）为主，冷气体主要局限于成员星系中。然而，这些状态之间的转变仍知之甚少。我们展示了一个演化至z=2.7的大质量星团前身体的宇宙学放大模拟，通过提高CGM分辨率以更好地追踪ICM诞生前的吸积、并合和反馈事件。我们将这一演化与模拟的MgII和OVII吸收线联系起来，追踪低电离和高电离气体相。我们还利用后处理辐射传输研究了Lyman-α（Lyα）和Balmer-α（Hα）发射晕。在z~4.4至2.7之间，一次大并合和活动星系核反馈驱动了由内而外的转变，将气体重新分布到更大半径，并使得密度、温度和金属丰度轮廓变得平坦。中等柱密度的MgII吸收体被迅速摧毁，留下与卫星星系相关的更团块化的冷气体分布，而气体被电离至OVII以上，内晕进入X射线波段。即使没有活动星系核光电离，一个延展的Lyα发射晕仍可探测到，并随着流入气体被破坏而从丝状演化为更球状。我们的基准模型低估了观测到的中心Lyα发射——我们可能需要在核区更有效地产生Lyα，要么通过更有效的恒星Lyα光子逃逸，要么通过增强活动星系核驱动的电离向Lyα发射的转换。Hα发射晕比Lyα更暗更小，但借助JWST，它们可能成为追踪这一关键时期演化中的CGM的互补探针。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用总结：星系团形成早期经历了从冷气体主导到热介质主导的快速转变，Lyα和Hα发射晕可作为追踪这一关键时期环星系介质演化的互补探针，但需要改进模型以更好地解释中心Lyα发射。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Maps of gas number density (left column), temperature (centre column) and metallicity (right column), at four redshifts \(z=4.4,3.7,3.3,\) and \(2.7\) (from top to bottom). All maps show mass-weighted average quantities. The density maps are zoomed in further to highlight the transition from a filamentary to clumpy cool gas structure in the CGM as the halo grows. Dashed circles in all panels denote \(R_{200}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：气体数密度（左列）、温度（中列）和金属丰度（右列）的图，对应四个红移 \(z=4.4,3.7,3.3,\) 和 \(2.7\) （从上到下）。所有图显示质量加权平均量。密度图进一步放大以突出随着晕增长，CGM中从丝状到团块状冷气体结构的转变。所有面板中的虚线圆圈表示 \(R_{200}\) 。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Volume-weighted average profiles of gas density (top panel), temperature (middle panel) and metallicity (bottom panel) for the protocluster from \(z=8\) (purple) to \(z=2.7\) (yellow). Coloured markers at the top and bottom of each panel show the position of \(R_{200}\) at each time. As the halo grows we can see how the density profile flattens, the hot halo expands, and the forming ICM is enriched to a near-uniform metallicity.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：原星团从 \(z=8\) （紫色）到 \(z=2.7\) （黄色）的体积加权平均气体密度（上方面板）、温度（中间面板）和金属丰度（下面板）轮廓。每个面板顶部和底部的彩色标记显示每个时刻 \(R_{200}\) 的位置。随着晕增长，我们可以看到密度轮廓如何变平，热晕如何膨胀，以及形成的ICM如何被增丰至近乎均匀的金属丰度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Radial profiles of gas fractions in different phases for the protocluster from \(z=8\) (purple) to \(z=2.7\) (yellow). The panels show the fractions for, from top to bottom, gas with temperature \(T 10^{7.5}\,{K}\) . Coloured markers at the top and bottom of each panel show the position of \(R_{200}\) at each time. The gaseous halo heats up from the inside out as it grows, with the increasing temperature affecting the ionisation state of the nascent ICM.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：原星团从 \(z=8\) （紫色）到 \(z=2.7\) （黄色）不同相中气体分数的径向轮廓。面板从上到下依次显示温度 \(T 10^{7.5}\,{K}\) 的气体分数。每个面板顶部和底部的彩色标记显示每个时刻 \(R_{200}\) 的位置。气态晕在增长过程中从内向外加热，温度升高影响新生ICM的电离状态。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Evolution of the covering fraction of Mg ii , for column densities \(N_{{Mg\,II}}>10^{6}\) cm -2 (top panel), and for columns \(N_{{Mg\,II}}>10^{11}\) cm -2 (bottom panel) as a function of radius. Coloured markers at the top and bottom of each panel show the position of \(R_{200}\) at each time. The covering fraction of Mg ii drops with time as the halo grows, with the \(50-250\,\) kpc range particularly affected for high column densities as intermediate density gas is destroyed.
figures.caption_zh: 图4：Mg II 覆盖分数随半径的演化，对应柱密度 \(N_{{Mg\,II}}>10^{6}\) cm -2 （上方面板）和 \(N_{{Mg\,II}}>10^{11}\) cm -2 （下面板）。每个面板顶部和底部的彩色标记显示每个时刻 \(R_{200}\) 的位置。随着晕增长，Mg II 的覆盖分数随时间下降，其中 \(50-250\,\) kpc 范围对高柱密度尤其受影响，因为中等密度气体被破坏。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Evolution of the distribution of Mg ii column densities within 500 kpc of the forming cluster’s centre. Intermediate columns of Mg ii are gradually destroyed, while the highest columns remain unchanged, leading to a clumpier distribution dominated by satellite galaxies.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：形成中星团中心500 kpc内Mg II柱密度分布的演化。中等柱密度的Mg II逐渐被破坏，而最高柱密度保持不变，导致分布更团块化，由卫星星系主导。

figures.caption_en: Figure 6: Evolution of the covering fraction of O vii , for columns \(N_{{O\,VII}}>10^{14}\) cm -2 , as a function of radius. Coloured markers at the top and bottom of each panel show the position of \(R_{200}\) at each time. Initially, the expansion of the hot halo allows O vii to be ionised at larger radii, but by the end the gas is ionised to even higher states from the inside out.
figures.caption_zh: 图6：OVII 覆盖分数随半径的演化，对应柱密度 \(N_{{O\,VII}}>10^{14}\) cm -2 。每个面板顶部和底部的彩色标记显示每个时刻 \(R_{200}\) 的位置。最初，热晕的膨胀允许OVII在更大半径处被电离，但到结束时，气体从内向外被电离至更高状态。

figures.caption_en: Figure 7: Evolution of the distribution of O vii column densities in the forming protocluster. High column densities build up as the halo grows and ionises more O vii . However, a bimodal distribution by \(z=2.7\) shows how gas begins to become ionised beyond O vii as the ICM forms.
figures.caption_zh: 图7：形成中原星团中OVII柱密度分布的演化。随着晕增长并电离更多OVII，高柱密度逐渐积累。然而，到 \(z=2.7\) 时的双峰分布显示，随着ICM形成，气体开始被电离至OVII以上。

figures.caption_en: Figure 8: Spatial maps of Ly \(\alpha\) surface brightness (with no AGN ionisation), convolved with a 1 arcsecond Gaussian, at four redshifts \(z=4.4,3.7,3.3,\) and \(2.7\) (from top to bottom). The left column shows observed maps, including the effects of dust attenuation and Ly \(\alpha\) resonant scattering, and the right column shows intrinsic maps, showing pure emission without attenuation or scattering. The size and orientation of the projections are the same as shown in Fig. 1 . Dashed white circles in each panel show \(R_{200}\) . Ly \(\alpha\) traces the presence of dense, neutral gas, and resonant scattering is required to illuminate halo outskirts from a central source.
figures.caption_zh: 图8：Ly \(\alpha\) 表面亮度（无活动星系核电离）的空间图，经1角秒高斯卷积，对应四个红移 \(z=4.4,3.7,3.3,\) 和 \(2.7\) （从上到下）。左列显示观测图，包括尘埃消光和Ly \(\alpha\) 共振散射的影响；右列显示本征图，展示无消光或散射的纯发射。投影的大小和方向与图1相同。每个面板中的白色虚线圆圈显示 \(R_{200}\) 。Ly \(\alpha\) 追踪致密中性气体的存在，共振散射需要从中心源照亮晕的外围区域。

title: Characterization of molecular outflows at core-scale in the massive clump AGAL G345.0029-0.224
comment: Accepted for publicacion in Boletín de la Asociación Argentina de Astronomía (February 2026)
summary: High-mass stars, with their powerful winds and intense radiation fields, are fundamental in regulating galactic dynamics and evolution; however, despite their great relevance, the mechanisms involved in their formation are still not fully understood. In this context, molecular outflows, which are essential for removing angular momentum and allowing accretion onto the central object, are a crucial phenomenon for characterizing their formation. Previous studies reveal a discrepancy in the masses of outflows associated with high-mass clumps between works conducted at the clump scale ($\sim$ pc) and those at the core scale ($\sim$ subpc). This suggests that the high-mass outflow activity observed at the clump scale might be the result of the contribution from several lower-mass outflows linked to individual molecular cores. This work presents a study of the molecular gas toward a high-mass clump associated with an Extended Green Object (EGO). EGOs are indicators of jets associated with high-mass protostars. Employing high angular resolution data from the Atacama Large Millimeter/submillimeter Array (ALMA), the presence of several hot cores with outflow activity was observed in the source. A characterization of the outflows at the core scale is presented within the context of the physical parameters of the molecular clumps.

AI.tldr: 该研究使用ALMA高分辨率数据分析了与扩展绿色天体相关的高质量分子云核中的分子外流，揭示了在核心尺度上多个热核的外流活动，解释了云核尺度观测到的外流质量差异可能源于多个低质量外流的叠加贡献。
AI.motivation: 高质量恒星的形成机制尚不完全清楚，分子外流在去除角动量、促进中心天体吸积方面至关重要。先前研究发现云核尺度（~pc）和核心尺度（~subpc）观测到的外流质量存在差异，表明云核尺度观测到的高质量外流活动可能是多个低质量外流叠加的结果。
AI.method: 使用阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）的高角分辨率数据，研究一个与扩展绿色天体（EGO）相关的高质量分子云核。EGO是高质量原恒星喷流的指示器。通过分析分子气体，观测并表征核心尺度的外流活动。
AI.result: 在源中观测到多个具有外流活动的热核，并在核心尺度上对这些外流进行了表征。研究结果支持了云核尺度观测到的高质量外流活动可能源于多个低质量外流叠加的假设。
AI.conclusion: 高质量恒星形成区域的外流活动在核心尺度上表现出复杂的结构，多个热核的外流贡献共同形成了云核尺度观测到的外流特征。这有助于理解高质量恒星形成过程中角动量去除和吸积的机制。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 大质量恒星凭借其强大的风和强烈的辐射场，在调节星系动力学和演化中起着基础性作用；然而，尽管它们具有重大意义，其形成机制仍未完全理解。在此背景下，分子外流对于移除角动量并允许物质吸积到中心天体至关重要，是表征其形成的关键现象。先前的研究揭示了在大质量团块尺度（~秒差距）和核心尺度（~亚秒差距）的研究中，与大质量团块相关的外流质量存在差异。这表明在团块尺度观测到的高质量外流活动可能是由多个与单个分子核心相关的较低质量外流共同贡献的结果。本工作对与一个扩展绿色天体（EGO）相关的大质量团块中的分子气体进行了研究。EGO是与大质量原恒星相关的喷流的指示器。利用阿塔卡马大型毫米波/亚毫米波阵列（ALMA）的高角分辨率数据，在源中观测到了几个具有外流活动的热核。在分子团块物理参数的背景下，呈现了核心尺度外流的表征。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于现有摘要，高质量恒星形成区域的外流活动在核心尺度上表现出复杂的结构，多个热核的外流贡献共同形成了云核尺度观测到的外流特征。这有助于理解高质量恒星形成过程中角动量去除和吸积的机制。

title: Ram-pressure-induced star formation in low-mass galaxies infalling on-to the Coma cluster: insights from DESI
summary: Ram-pressure stripping is a key driver of galaxy morphological transformation in clusters, contributing to the formation of quenched, especially dwarf, populations. Ram-pressure compression can also induce a starburst prior to quenching and build up significant stellar mass in an initially gas-rich galaxy. The detailed physics of these processes remains poorly understood, especially in the low-mass regime. Here we demonstrate that the key factor for a ram-pressure induced starburst in a low-mass galaxy is its angular momentum within a host cluster. In this study, we select a sample of 41 post-starburst galaxies (PSGs) in the Coma cluster using the DESI EDR spectroscopic data, extending to low luminosities ($M_g < -14$). This sample is at least 90% complete down to $M_g \approx -14.8$, which enabled us a systematic analysis of their properties. For each galaxy, we use projected cluster-centric distances and line-of-sight velocities to constrain the normalized orbital angular momentum and a 3D radial coordinate to the cluster center, assuming zero orbital energy. The resulting probability distributions show that while star-forming galaxies are split into two populations favoring intermediate and high angular momentum, almost all PSGs prefer high angular momentum. Our analysis statistically demonstrates that ram-pressure-induced starbursts are more efficient on tangential orbits, where gas stripping proceeds slowly enough to allow substantial star formation before gas removal.

artifacts.abstract_zh: 冲压剥离是星系团中星系形态转变的关键驱动力，有助于形成淬灭的（尤其是矮）星系群。冲压压缩还可以在淬灭前诱发星暴，并在初始富含气体的星系中积累显著的恒星质量。这些过程的详细物理机制仍知之甚少，特别是在低质量星系中。在此，我们证明低质量星系中冲压诱导星暴的关键因素是其所在宿主星系团内的角动量。在本研究中，我们利用DESI早期数据发布（EDR）光谱数据，在室女星系团中选取了41个星暴后星系（PSG）样本，其亮度延伸至低光度（$M_g < -14$）。该样本在$M_g \approx -14.8$以下至少90%完备，这使我们能够系统分析它们的性质。对于每个星系，我们利用投影的星系团中心距离和视线速度，在假设轨道能量为零的条件下，约束归一化轨道角动量以及到星系团中心的三维径向坐标。得到的概率分布显示，虽然恒星形成星系分为偏好中等和高角动量的两个群体，但几乎所有PSG都偏好高角动量。我们的分析统计表明，冲压诱导的星暴在切向轨道上更有效，因为在这些轨道上气体剥离进行得足够缓慢，从而在气体被移除前允许大量的恒星形成。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：低质量星系在星系团中的轨道角动量是决定冲压剥离能否诱导星暴的关键因素，高角动量轨道允许气体剥离缓慢进行，为星暴提供足够时间。

title: EMU/GAMA: Refining Dust Extinction Corrections for Hα Luminosity Functions Using Radio-Based Calibration
comment: 15 pages, 5 Figures, 4 Tables, accepted for publication in PASA
summary: We present a novel approach to correcting H$α$ luminosity functions for dust extinction by calibrating against radio-based star formation rates (SFRs), using data from the Evolutionary Map of the Universe (EMU) and Galaxy and Mass Assembly (GAMA) surveys. Accurate dust correction is essential for deriving SFRs from rest-frame UV-optical emission lines, particularly as the \textit{James Webb Space Telescope} extends such measurements to galaxies at $z>5$. While a luminosity dependence of dust obscuration has long been recognised, our method exploits the empirical relationship between obscured (H$α$) and unobscured (radio) SFRs to provide a dust correction that can be applied where traditional spectroscopic techniques, e.g. Balmer line based approaches, are unavailable. We apply the SFR based dust correction to 25 published H$α$ luminosity functions spanning $0<z<8$, and derive corresponding star formation rate densities (SFRDs). Adopting the locally calibrated H$α$--radio relation ends up with an overestimate of the cosmic SFRD by more than two orders of magnitude at $z\gtrsim1$. Motivated by the luminosity dependent relation in the local Universe, we introduce a new model where the luminosity dependence of the dust obscuration decreases with increasing redshift. This approach can reproduce observed SFRDs across cosmic time. These results highlight the potential of a radio-based calibration for dust correction, where a luminosity dependent correction would need to decline in strength with increasing redshift. This implies that the dust content or distribution in galaxies at early epochs differs substantially from that in the local Universe.

AI.tldr: 提出基于射电校准的Hα光度函数尘埃校正新方法，发现高红移宇宙恒星形成率密度被高估，提出尘埃遮蔽的光度依赖性随红移减弱的模型
AI.motivation: 准确尘埃校正对于从静止紫外-光学发射线推导恒星形成率至关重要，特别是随着JWST将测量扩展到z>5的星系。传统光谱技术（如巴尔末线方法）不可用时需要新的尘埃校正方法。
AI.method: 利用EMU和GAMA巡天数据，通过校准被尘埃遮蔽的Hα恒星形成率与无遮蔽的射电恒星形成率之间的经验关系，开发基于射电的尘埃校正方法。将此方法应用于25个已发表的Hα光度函数，并推导相应的恒星形成率密度。

AI.conclusion: 基于射电校准的尘埃校正方法具有潜力，但需要光度依赖性校正强度随红移增加而减弱。这表明早期星系中的尘埃含量或分布与本地宇宙有显著差异。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的方法，通过利用来自演化宇宙图谱（EMU）和星系与质量组装（GAMA）巡天的数据，校准基于射电的恒星形成率（SFRs），来校正Hα光度函数的尘埃消光。准确的尘埃校正对于从静止系紫外-光学发射线推导SFRs至关重要，特别是当詹姆斯·韦伯太空望远镜将此类测量扩展到红移z>5的星系时。虽然尘埃遮蔽的光度依赖性早已被认识，但我们的方法利用了被遮蔽（Hα）和未被遮蔽（射电）SFRs之间的经验关系，提供了一种可在传统光谱技术（例如基于巴尔默线的方法）不可用时应用的尘埃校正。我们将基于SFR的尘埃校正应用于25个已发表的跨越0<z<8的Hα光度函数，并推导出相应的恒星形成率密度（SFRDs）。采用本地校准的Hα-射电关系会导致在z≳1处宇宙SFRD被高估超过两个数量级。受本地宇宙中光度依赖关系的启发，我们引入了一个新模型，其中尘埃遮蔽的光度依赖性随红移增加而减弱。这种方法可以重现整个宇宙时间内的观测SFRDs。这些结果凸显了基于射电校准的尘埃校正的潜力，其中光度依赖性校正的强度需要随红移增加而减弱。这意味着早期星系中的尘埃含量或分布与本地宇宙有显著差异。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于射电校准的尘埃校正方法具有潜力，但需要光度依赖性校正强度随红移增加而减弱。这表明早期星系中的尘埃含量或分布与本地宇宙有显著差异。（基于可用摘要）

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: The BPT diagram, which uses the [OIII]/H \(\beta\) and [NII]/H \(\alpha\) emission line ratios, classifies galaxies as star-forming galaxies (SFGs), active galactic nuclei (AGNs), or composite sources. SFGs, represented by pink stars, lie below the dashed blue Kauffmann line; AGNs, represented by orange circles, are positioned above the solid blue Kewley line; and composite sources, shown as yellow diamonds, are located between the two diagnostic lines. These sources are drawn from the EMU and GAMA catalogues and were processed as described in § 2 .
figures.caption_zh: 图1：BPT图，使用[OIII]/H \(\beta\) 和 [NII]/H \(\alpha\) 发射线比，将星系分类为恒星形成星系（SFGs）、活动星系核（AGNs）或复合源。SFGs（以粉色星形表示）位于蓝色虚线Kauffmann线下方；AGNs（以橙色圆形表示）位于蓝色实线Kewley线上方；复合源（以黄色菱形表示）位于两条诊断线之间。这些源来自EMU和GAMA星表，并按照第2节所述进行处理。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: The relationship between H \(\alpha\) and \(1.4\) GHz radio tracers of star formation. Four models are shown: the solid line is the best-fit relation to the local EMU-GAMA SFG sample, while the dashed line marks the 1:1 case, where H \(\alpha\) and radio SFRs would be equal, making the 1:1 line the dust free line. The dotted and dot-dashed lines represent proposed interim models. For each model, the redshift interval over which its dust-corrected results align with the published SFRD measurements from Figure 4 is indicated. The truncated equation for each model is shown here for reference but can be seen in full in Table 1 . The calibration from hopkins_toward_2001 is shown in orange.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：H \(\alpha\) 与 \(1.4\) GHz射电示踪物之间的恒星形成关系。显示了四个模型：实线是对本地EMU-GAMA SFG样本的最佳拟合关系，虚线标记了1:1情况，其中H \(\alpha\) 和射电SFRs相等，因此1:1线是无尘埃线。点线和点划线代表提出的中间模型。对于每个模型，其尘埃校正结果与图4中已发表SFRD测量值一致的红移区间已标出。每个模型的截断方程在此显示以供参考，完整方程见表1。来自hopkins_toward_2001的校准以橙色显示。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Fitted models for the relationship between H \(\alpha\) and 1.4GHz radio wavelength tracers. Here Model 1 is the 1:1 case with no correction, Model 4 is the fitted relationship to the data and Models 2 and 3 are two intermediate cases that have been chosen to fit SFRD data presented in § 4 .
figures.caption_zh: 表1：H \(\alpha\) 与1.4GHz射电波长示踪物之间关系的拟合模型。这里模型1是1:1情况，无校正；模型4是对数据的拟合关系；模型2和3是两个中间情况，被选择用于拟合第4节中呈现的SFRD数据。

figures.caption_en: Table 2: Correction factors converting uncorrected H \(\alpha\) star formation rates to radio-derived star formation rates as a function of redshift and uncorrected H \(\alpha\) luminosity. Correction factors are defined as the ratio \({SFR}_{{1.4GHz}}/{SFR}_{{H}\alpha,\textrm{uncorrected}}\) and are shown for four representative uncorrected H \(\alpha\) luminosities. Luminosities are given in units of \(10^{36}\,{WHz^{-1}}\) .
figures.caption_zh: 表2：将未校正的H \(\alpha\) 恒星形成率转换为射电推导的恒星形成率的校正因子，作为红移和未校正的H \(\alpha\) 光度的函数。校正因子定义为比值 \({SFR}_{{1.4GHz}}/{SFR}_{{H}\alpha,\textrm{uncorrected}}\) ，并针对四个代表性的未校正H \(\alpha\) 光度显示。光度以 \(10^{36}\,{WHz^{-1}}\) 为单位。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Published luminosity values, corrected for dust obscuration using the fitted SFR relation from Figure 2 (coloured symbols), along with the corresponding best-fit Schechter functions (dashed line), shown across six redshift bins. Where possible, raw luminosity data from these sources have been used; if necessary, published dust corrections were removed. Our fitted SFR-based dust correction relation (Model 4) was applied instead and new LFs were refitted, where the shaded region depicts the 95% confidence interval from 100,000 MCMC iterations. See § 2.4 for relevant published H \(\alpha\) luminosity data.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：使用图2中拟合的SFR关系校正尘埃遮蔽后的已发表光度值（彩色符号），以及相应的最佳拟合Schechter函数（虚线），在六个红移区间内显示。在可能的情况下，使用了这些来源的原始光度数据；如有必要，移除了已发表的尘埃校正。我们应用了拟合的基于SFR的尘埃校正关系（模型4），并重新拟合了新的LF，其中阴影区域描绘了来自100,000次MCMC迭代的95%置信区间。相关已发表的H \(\alpha\) 光度数据见第2.4节。

figures.caption_en: Table 3: Best-fit parameters of H \(\alpha\) Luminosity function for maximum dust correction model, including reduced chi-squared ( \(\chi^{2}\) ) values for each redshift bin.
figures.caption_zh: 表3：最大尘埃校正模型的H \(\alpha\) 光度函数最佳拟合参数，包括每个红移区间的约化卡方（ \(\chi^{2}\) ）值。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Cosmic SFRDs derived from dust-corrected luminosity functions using each of our four dust correction models, shown in Table 1 . These results are compared with recent dust-corrected measurements from covelo-paz_h_2024 and chiang2025cosmicinfraredbackgroundtomography in dashed and dot-dashed linesrespectively. The madau_cosmic_2014 relation is also shown in solid grey for comparison. Published dust-corrected star formation rate density (SFRD) values are shown in grey, with markers indicating the observational tracer: UV (circles), H \(\alpha\) (triangles), infrared (squares), and radio (diamonds). The published data is compiled in Table 4 .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：使用表1中我们的四个尘埃校正模型中的每一个，从尘埃校正后的光度函数推导出的宇宙SFRDs。这些结果与来自covelo-paz_h_2024和chiang2025cosmicinfraredbackgroundtomography的最新尘埃校正测量值（分别以虚线和点划线表示）进行了比较。madau_cosmic_2014关系也以灰色实线显示以供比较。已发表的尘埃校正恒星形成率密度（SFRD）值以灰色显示，标记表示观测示踪物：紫外（圆形）、H \(\alpha\) （三角形）、红外（方形）和射电（菱形）。已发表的数据汇编在表4中。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: The SFRD from a spline fit to the step-function model for the SFRD evolution, illustrating the evolving dust correction derived from the fitted relationship between H \(\alpha\) and radio SFR tracers. Here the symbols are the same as in Figure 4 . The colors of the spline fit correspond to those in Figure 4 for the model proposed in each redshift range, from the ’local Universe dust content’ scenario of Model 4 to the ’dust-free’ scenario of Model 1. The data points where the spline fit changes model are shown by the overlayed markers, where the marker type represents the model as shown in Figure 4 .
figures.caption_zh: 图5：来自SFRD演化的阶跃函数样条拟合的SFRD，展示了从H \(\alpha\) 和射电SFR示踪物之间拟合关系推导出的演化尘埃校正。这里的符号与图4相同。样条拟合的颜色对应于图4中每个红移范围提出的模型颜色，从模型4的“本地宇宙尘埃含量”情景到模型1的“无尘埃”情景。样条拟合改变模型的数据点由叠加的标记显示，标记类型代表图4中所示的模型。

title: Fast partial-sky spherical harmonic transforms
summary: We discuss in some details a novel algorithm for performing partial-sky spherical harmonic transforms (SHT), building on the Fourier-sphere method of Reinecke et al (2023) handling efficiently high numbers of arbitrary locations on the sphere. Our main motivations are Cosmic Microwave Background lensing from the South Pole Telescope, and the South Pole Observatory program targeting primordial gravitational waves from inflation, requiring high-resolution, numerically intensive work on small sky fractions. We achieve speed-up factors ranging from 3 to 10 on SPT-3G main field and BICEP3 deep footprint, and much more on smaller patches. More generally, the algorithm eliminates in our case study the usual disadvantages of arbitrary pixelisations in comparison to isolatitude pixelisations or flat-sky approximations, making it ideal for ambitious workflows that require repeated SHTs on limited sky regions.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种新的部分天区球谐变换算法，基于傅里叶球方法，能高效处理球面上大量任意位置点，特别适用于小天空区域的高分辨率计算。
AI.motivation: 主要动机来自南极望远镜的宇宙微波背景透镜化研究和南极观测站的原初引力波探测项目，这些工作需要在小天空区域进行高分辨率、计算密集型的球谐变换。
AI.method: 基于Reinecke等人（2023）的傅里叶球方法，开发了一种处理球面上任意位置点的新算法，特别针对部分天区的球谐变换进行了优化。
AI.result: 在SPT-3G主场和BICEP3深场足迹上实现了3到10倍的加速，在更小的天区上加速效果更显著。该算法消除了任意像素化相对于等纬度像素化或平面天空近似的传统劣势。
AI.conclusion: 该算法非常适合需要在有限天空区域重复进行球谐变换的复杂工作流程，为高分辨率宇宙学分析提供了高效的数值工具。

artifacts.abstract_zh: 我们详细讨论了一种用于执行部分天球球谐变换（SHT）的新算法，该算法建立在Reinecke等人（2023）的傅里叶球面方法之上，能够高效处理球面上大量任意位置。我们的主要动机来自南极望远镜的宇宙微波背景透镜效应，以及旨在探测暴胀产生的原初引力波的南极观测站计划，这些研究需要在小天区上进行高分辨率、高计算量的工作。我们在SPT-3G主天区和BICEP3深场区域实现了3到10倍的加速比，在更小的天区上加速效果更为显著。更一般地说，在我们的案例研究中，该算法消除了任意像素化相对于等纬度像素化或平面天球近似的常见缺点，使其成为需要在有限天空区域重复进行SHT的复杂工作流程的理想选择。
artifacts.conclusion_zh: 基于可用摘要：该算法非常适合需要在有限天空区域重复进行球谐变换的复杂工作流程，为高分辨率宇宙学分析提供了高效的数值工具。

figures.caption_en: Figure 1: Sky regions we consider here for our tests and that motivated this work. Black is SPT-3G main field [ 10 ] , blue the BICEP3 polarization weight map contour enclosing the central 630 square degrees, and orange the South Pole Telescope observation of the Euclid Deep Field South (EDFS) [ 11 ] . Their area is about 1500, 800 and 57 square degrees, respectively.
figures.caption_zh: 图1：我们在此测试中考虑并启发了这项工作的天空区域。黑色为SPT-3G主天区[10]，蓝色为BICEP3偏振权重图等高线，包围了中心630平方度区域，橙色为南极望远镜对欧几里得深场南（EDFS）的观测[11]。它们的面积分别约为1500、800和57平方度。

figures.caption_en: Figure 2: Illustration of the synthesis general operation, for a scalar transform. The top panel shows the map to be evaluated on a set of points of sphere, starting from given spherical harmonic coefficients. In this case, the region of interest is the SPT-3G region as defined by the black contours on Fig. 1 . This is shown after placing the north pole \(\theta=0\) in the center of the patch. Placing the pole in the center stretches the map to a maximum horizontally, reducing the band-limit in that direction (reducing \(m_{\text{max}}\) ). The lower panel shows the Fourier map which is actually evaluated, after stretching and weighting in the vertical direction. The effective Fourier band-limit of the map is now reduced to a minimum in both directions, allowing faster evaluation. In the case of BICEP3, in blue, we can visibly stretch significantly more, improving performance further.
figures.caption_zh: 图2：标量变换中综合一般操作的示意图。顶部面板显示了从给定的球谐系数开始，在一组球面点上评估的星图。在这种情况下，感兴趣的区域是由图1中黑色等高线定义的SPT-3G区域。这是在将北极\(\theta=0\)置于天区中心之后显示的。将极点置于中心会水平方向最大程度地拉伸星图，从而减少该方向的带限（减少\(m_{\text{max}}\)）。底部面板显示了实际评估的傅里叶星图，经过垂直方向的拉伸和加权后。星图的有效傅里叶带限现在在两个方向上都降至最低，从而允许更快的评估。对于蓝色的BICEP3，我们可以明显拉伸得更多，从而进一步提高性能。

figures.caption_en: Figure 3: Polar optimization and equatorial symmetry: Performance comparison of ducc0 spherical harmonic synthesis on regions of fixed co-latitude extent (here 20 degrees), as a function of the center co-latitude. Each region has the same number of pixels, which is set very small for this test. Shown are spin-0 and spin-2 transforms (the latter rescaled by a factor \(1/2\) ) , using \(\ell_{\text{max}}=5000\) . Owing to the irrelevance of \(m\) -values well above \(\ell_{\text{max}}\sin\theta\) , optimal performance is reached near the poles. The trough at the equator arises when the band crosses the equator: the underlying \(\theta\) grid is such that it is symmetric with respect to the equator, and the calculation of a pair of symmetric rings has the same cost than for one member of the pair.
figures.caption_zh: 图3：极地优化和赤道对称性：在固定共纬度范围（此处为20度）的区域上，作为中心共纬度函数的ducc0球谐合成的性能比较。每个区域具有相同数量的像素，在此测试中设置得非常小。显示了自旋0和自旋2变换（后者按因子\(1/2\)重新缩放），使用\(\ell_{\text{max}}=5000\)。由于远高于\(\ell_{\text{max}}\sin\theta\)的\(m\)值无关紧要，因此在极点附近达到最佳性能。当带跨越赤道时，在赤道处出现低谷：底层的\(\theta\)网格相对于赤道是对称的，计算一对对称环的成本与计算该对中一个成员的成本相同。

figures.caption_en: Figure 4: Upper panel : Construction of our window, green, from the convolution of a top-hat, in blue, with a compactly supported bell-like function, \(b\) , orange (here the ES kernel, indistinguishable from a Gaussian on this figure), rescaled such that its support is \(\Delta\Theta\) . The support of the top-hat is \(2\pi-\Theta\) . In this construction, the rise and decay of the window is given by the cumulative function of the bell. In Fourier space, the window is in all cases the same universal function at the rescaled frequencies \(k=n\Delta\Theta/2\pi\) , given by the product of the two Fourier windows. The problem of optimizing the window is reduced to that of picking the best bell function. Lower panel: Fourier transform of the Slepian-alike Kaiser-Bessel bell, for two values of shape parameter (main lobe width) \(\alpha\) , as given by Eq. ( 19 ). Desirable is \(\alpha\) as small as possible, reducing the width of the main-lobe and the corresponding apodization length. However, this is only possible as long as the side-lobe of the window is well below the desired tolerance \(\epsilon\) . This reasoning gives the direct correspondences for the best choice of window \(\pi\alpha\sim|\ln\epsilon|\) , and \(2\alpha\sim\Delta\ell\) .
figures.caption_zh: 图4：上面板：我们的窗口（绿色）的构造，由矩形函数（蓝色）与紧支撑钟形函数\(b\)（橙色，此处为ES核，在此图上与高斯函数无法区分）卷积而成，重新缩放使其支撑为\(\Delta\Theta\)。矩形函数的支撑为\(2\pi-\Theta\)。在这种构造中，窗口的上升和衰减由钟形函数的累积函数给出。在傅里叶空间中，在所有情况下，窗口在缩放频率\(k=n\Delta\Theta/2\pi\)处都是相同的通用函数，由两个傅里叶窗口的乘积给出。优化窗口的问题简化为选择最佳钟形函数。下面板：类Slepian的Kaiser-Bessel钟形函数的傅里叶变换，针对形状参数（主瓣宽度）\(\alpha\)的两个值，如方程(19)所示。期望\(\alpha\)尽可能小，以减少主瓣宽度和相应的切趾长度。然而，只有当窗口的旁瓣远低于所需容差\(\epsilon\)时，这才可能实现。这一推理给出了窗口最佳选择的直接对应关系：\(\pi\alpha\sim|\ln\epsilon|\)，以及\(2\alpha\sim\Delta\ell\)。

figures.caption_en: Figure 5: Top panel: One-dimensional power spectra \(c_{m}\) along great circles for a few special cases of spherical power spectra \(C_{\ell}\) . This is for \(\ell_{\text{max}}=4000\) , and with arbitrary normalization. Blue has a perfectly white spherical spectrum, and orange a perfectly scale-invariant one. Green shows the case where there is power only at \(\ell_{\text{max}}\) and nowhere else. Red results from a \(\Lambda\) CDM polarization \(E\) -mode power spectrum. Lower Panel: Predicted (envelope of) the error, Eq.( 28 ), as function of \(\theta\) in our baseline apodization procedure, for three spherical caps \(\theta^{*}\) as indicated by the vertical dashed lines. The colored bands indicate the apodization region. The circles indicate the worst error inside the cap. This is for \(\ell_{\text{max}}=4000\) and desired tolerance \(\epsilon=10^{-7}\) (dashed black), and for the case of a perfectly white spherical power spectrum.
figures.caption_zh: 图5：上面板：对于球面功率谱\(C_{\ell}\)的几个特殊情况，沿大圆的一维功率谱\(c_{m}\)。此处\(\ell_{\text{max}}=4000\)，并采用任意归一化。蓝色具有完全白色的球面谱，橙色具有完全尺度不变的谱。绿色显示了仅在\(\ell_{\text{max}}\)处有功率而其他地方没有的情况。红色来自\(\Lambda\)CDM极化\(E\)模功率谱。下面板：对于三个球冠\(\theta^{*}\)（如垂直虚线所示），在我们的基线切趾程序中，作为\(\theta\)函数的预测误差（包络线），方程(28)。彩色带表示切趾区域。圆圈表示球冠内的最差误差。此处\(\ell_{\text{max}}=4000\)，所需容差\(\epsilon=10^{-7}\)（黑色虚线），且针对完全白色的球面功率谱情况。

figures.caption_en: Table 1: Some performance benchmarks. The number of points is set by the effective resolution in the fourth column (corresponding crudely to that of an Healpix [ 15 ] nside parameter of 2048, 4096 or 8192). Speed-up factors compared to original ducc0.sht 0.40.0 routines are given in the 5th and 6th columns. They are computed from 10 realizations, each using 4 cores. Our new method is implemented as minor tweaks to the most recent ducc code (only the weighting of the rings and their locations are new). All other elements are identical, benefiting from the same CPU vector accelerations and other optimizations. Here the tolerance is set to \(10^{-7}\) . The tolerance only has a minor impact on the execution times – this only affects a fractional correction to the total work to perform. SPT-3G+/BICEP3 denotes a subregion of SPT-3G footprint enclosing but slightly larger than the BICEP3 field.
figures.caption_zh: 表1：一些性能基准测试。点数由第四列中的有效分辨率设置（大致对应于Healpix [15] nside参数为2048、4096或8192）。与原始ducc0.sht 0.40.0例程相比的加速比在第5和第6列中给出。它们由10次实现计算得出，每次使用4个核心。我们的新方法作为对最新ducc代码的微小调整而实现（只有环的权重和位置是新的）。所有其他元素相同，受益于相同的CPU向量加速和其他优化。此处容差设置为\(10^{-7}\)。容差对执行时间影响很小——这仅影响要执行的总工作量的一小部分修正。SPT-3G+/BICEP3表示SPT-3G足迹的一个子区域，包围但略大于BICEP3天区。
